ddls:
CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio manager */,
  "initial_value" REAL /* Initial value of the portfolio */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the portfolio */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the portfolio (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the portfolio */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modified date of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hedging strategy associated with the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the asset belongs to */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., stock, option) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the asset (e.g., AAPL, TSLA) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the asset held */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the asset was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was purchased */,
  "last_traded_price" REAL /* Last traded price of the asset */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Current market value of the asset */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Last updated date of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_assets_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the stock traded */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount for the stock */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio for the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "option_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the option */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* Strike price of the option */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the option */,
  "option_type" TEXT /* Type of the option (e.g., call, put) */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the option */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the option */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the option */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the option */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the option traded */,
  "implied_volatility" REAL /* Implied volatility of the option */,
  "delta" REAL /* Delta value of the option */,
  "gamma" REAL /* Gamma value of the option */,
  "theta" REAL /* Theta value of the option */,
  "vega" REAL /* Vega value of the option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hedging_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hedging strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the hedging strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hedging strategy */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the strategy was created */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio manager who created the strategy */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modified date of the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hedging_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hedging transaction */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the transaction is associated with */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being hedged */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hedging strategy used */,
  "hedge_date" TEXT /* Date of the hedging transaction */,
  "hedge_type" TEXT /* Type of the hedging transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "hedge_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the asset hedged */,
  "hedge_price" REAL /* Price at which the asset was hedged */,
  "hedge_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the hedging transaction */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader who executed the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the hedging transaction (e.g., pending, executed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hedging_transactions_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES portfolio_assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hedging_transactions_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hedging_transactions_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES hedging_strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hedging_transactions_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hedging_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the performance record is associated with */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being hedged */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hedging strategy used */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance record */,
  "delta" REAL /* Delta value of the asset */,
  "hedging_error" REAL /* Hedging error */,
  "pnl" REAL /* Profit and loss (PNL) without hedging */,
  "pnl_with_hedge" REAL /* Profit and loss (PNL) with hedging */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the hedging strategy */,
  "sortino_ratio" REAL /* Sortino ratio of the hedging strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hedging_performance_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES hedging_strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hedging_performance_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hedging_performance_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES portfolio_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the portfolio manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the portfolio manager */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the portfolio manager (e.g., senior, junior) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the portfolio manager belongs to */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio manager was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traders" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader */,
  "trader_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trader */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the trader (e.g., senior, junior) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the trader belongs to */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the trader was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade log */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the trade is associated with */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset traded */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader who executed the trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of the trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "trade_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the asset traded */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the trade */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, executed, canceled) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trade (e.g., API, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_logs_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_logs_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_logs_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES portfolio_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_management" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk management setting */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the setting is associated with */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the setting applies to */,
  "max_loss" REAL /* Maximum allowable loss */,
  "stop_loss" REAL /* Stop-loss level */,
  "position_size" INTEGER /* Position size for the asset */,
  "max_position_size" INTEGER /* Maximum position size for the asset */,
  "risk_assessment_date" TEXT /* Date the risk assessment was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_management_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_management_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES portfolio_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the report is associated with */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, monthly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the report was uploaded */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_reports_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the portfolio or report */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio being accessed */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES portfolio_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., portfolio manager, trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the user was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
